name: FORD MOTOR CO
summary: Ford Motor Company, incorporated in Delaware in 1919, is a global automaker headquartered in Dearborn, Michigan. Ford develops, manufactures, and sells Ford and Lincoln branded ICE, hybrid, and electric vehicles including trucks, SUVs, commercial vans, and cars. Operations are organized into three segments: Ford Blue (ICE/hybrid), Ford Model e (EVs/software), and Ford Pro (commercial vehicles/services). Ford Motor Credit Company LLC provides financial services. In 2025, Ford sold approximately 4,395,000 vehicles worldwide.
